brand.name: Summit Ridge Window Cleaning
brand.tagline: High-end residential window cleaning specializing in large homes, glass restoration, and streak-free results.
brand.objection_handle: Clear quotes and honest expectations from the start.

about.story_text: Summit Ridge Window Cleaning specializes in high-end residential services, making it a strong candidate for a focused, high-conversion website.
about.founder_note: Built for people who value quality, clarity, and a smooth process.

features.title: Exterior Window Cleaning
features.description: Detailed cleaning designed to leave large glass surfaces clear, bright, and streak-free.

features.title: Glass Restoration
features.description: Restore clarity and improve the look of weathered or hard-water-marked glass.

features.title: Premium Home Service
features.description: Professional service for larger homes where detail, care, and presentation matter.

features.title: Large-Home Expertise
features.description: Comfortable with larger residential properties, expansive glass, and high-visibility details.

features.title: White-Glove Experience
features.description: Clear communication, careful work practices, and a polished customer experience from start to finish.

processSteps.description: Make sure the finished result looks right and the experience ends cleanly.

faqs.question: What is the process for window cleaning?
faqs.answer: The process is designed to feel clear and well-managed, from the first quote request through the final result.

faqs.question: How do you ensure streak-free results?
faqs.answer: Attention to detail, careful technique, and a quality-first approach help deliver a cleaner final result.

faqs.question: What areas do you service?
faqs.answer: We primarily serve Boulder, Colorado. Reach out if you want to confirm your location.

faqs.question: How does pricing work?
faqs.answer: We keep the experience clear, helpful, and easy to understand.

faqs.question: How do I know I can trust your service?
faqs.answer: We focus on customer testimonials and a professional customer experience so the service feels easy to trust.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I schedule?
faqs.answer: Start with a quote request and we'll help you confirm the scope before scheduling.
